nodes.name: Webhook
nodes.notes:
Reusable Slack poster. Other workflows (or external tools) POST here to fan a structured payload out to Slack with the same Block Kit shape the discovery workflows use. This exists for parity with the plan's Step 4.4 — the discovery_email and discovery_sam_gov workflows currently format + post inline for portability, but if you want a single choke point, point them at this endpoint instead.

Request body:
  POST http://localhost:5678/webhook/kaizen/slack-notify
  {
    "kind": "screening" | "draft_ready" | "info",
    "rfp_id": "<uuid>",
    "screening": { ... optional, for kind='screening' ... },
    "draft_id": "<uuid>" (optional, for kind='draft_ready')
  }
